title: vilfa gaditana
intro: Vilfa gaditana, also known as Spanish Club Moss or Vilfa, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Vilfa gaditana include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
